# Exact-pinned dependencies.
#
# WHY EXACT PINS: this tool's value is byte-reproducible output. A floating
# version (>=) could pull an updated ReportLab/python-docx/openpyxl on a future
# rebuild and silently change generated bytes, breaking the determinism contract
# and any certification evidence tied to a hash. These are the versions against
# which the deterministic baseline hashes were verified. Bump deliberately, and
# re-verify the baseline (see AI_README "Determinism contract") when you do.
lxml==6.0.2
jsonschema==4.26.0
python-docx==1.2.0
reportlab==4.4.10
Jinja2==3.1.6
openpyxl==3.1.5
